title: find_join_candidates data payload
description:
Structured payload for the `find_join_candidates` tool. Surfaces eBL's published lineToVec ranker locally — recall@15 = 3.4% on known joins (validation 2026-05-14). Use `find_parallel_text` (22% recall) as the primary discovery tool; this one cross-validates against eBL's algorithm.

Each candidate carries its raw and ruling-weighted score so downstream consumers can re-rank by their own combination. Provenance is `source: local`, `endpoint: local:lineToVecCorpus`, with `corpus_age_ms` reporting how old the cached index is.

corpus_size.description: Number of fragments scored against the target — i.e. how many have a non-empty lineToVec in our local cache.

corpus_age_ms.description: Age in milliseconds of the on-disk corpus snapshot. Re-run --prefetch to refresh.

top_by_raw_score.description: Top-K by raw prefix/suffix overlap length. Same NUMBER_OF_RESULTS_TO_RETURN = 15 as eBL's LineToVecRanker.

top_by_weighted_score.description: Top-K by ruling-weighted score (text lines 1×, single ruling 3×, double 6×, triple 10× — same WEIGHTS map as ebl-api).

score.description: Raw prefix/suffix overlap length (count of matched markers).

weighted_score.description: Ruling-weighted score using eBL's WEIGHTS map.

join_groups_str.description: Known join groups for this candidate, semicolon-separated. Useful for showing "this hit is from the same recorded join cluster".
